title: Metabolomics in bladder cancer: a systematic review.
author: Cheng Y Yang X Deng X Zhang X Li P Tao J Qin C Wei J Lu Q
content: S-EPMC4565288 PMC4565288 Metabolomics in bladder cancer: a systematic review. Bladder cancer (BC) is the most common urological malignancy. Early diagnosis of BC is crucial to improve patient outcomes. Currently, metabolomics is a potential technique that can be used to detect BC. We reviewed
